mapper.select: select * from review where orderId = #{orderId} and buyerId = #{buyerId}
select count(*) from review where postId = #{postId}
select count(*) from review where orderId = #{orderId}
select count(*) from review r inner join `order` o on r.orderId = o.orderId inner join transaction t on o.transactionId = t.transactionId where t.sellerId = #{sellerId}
select count(*) from review r inner join `order` o on r.orderId = o.orderId inner join transaction t on o.transactionId = t.transactionId where t.sellerId = #{sellerId} and r.rating >= #{threshold}
select avg(r.rating) from review r inner join `order` o on r.orderId = o.orderId inner join transaction t on o.transactionId = t.transactionId where t.sellerId = #{sellerId}
